utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: (1) health_coverage: physical and mental health insurance with costs, (2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs, (3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs, (4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs, and (5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The final coverage plan includes all five items. Each item is fully specified: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with providers, costs, and coverage details; property_coverage has provider, cost, and coverage; travel_coverage has provider, cost, and coverage; additional_services lists two services with costs and coverage; total_budget provides monthly and annual totals plus contribution details. Therefore, all 5 out of 5 items are fully covered and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
The final coverage plan lists all coverages under one provider, 'ConsultingPro'. To map each to the ground-truth ratings, we identify the closest equivalent plan by matching cost, coverage description, and category. 

1. Physical health coverage (ConsultingPro, €200/month, comprehensive international executive health coverage) matches 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' because it has the same monthly cost (€200) and offers comprehensive executive-level coverage — rating 10.

2. Mental health coverage (ConsultingPro, €120/month, full stress management, therapy, family therapy, 24/7 crisis support) matches 'EliteCare Premium Plan' (mental health section) — same cost and premium-level support — rating 10.

3. Property coverage (ConsultingPro, €90/month, high-value home contents, luxury items, business equipment protection) matches 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' (€90/month) — same cost and luxury protection — rating 10.

4. Travel coverage (ConsultingPro, €115/month, global executive and family travel protection with medical evacuation) matches 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' (€115/month) — same coverage type and cost — rating 10.

5. Additional services include 'concierge_service' (€32.5/month, 24/7 executive concierge) and 'premium_membership' (€32.5/month, priority claims processing). The concierge service aligns conceptually with 'Concierge Services' from travel_enhancement_services (though cost structure differs), but the premium_membership clearly matches 'Premium Insurance Membership' (general_services) — rating 10.

Given no exact cost match for 'Concierge Services' (€3000/month in ground truth), we focus on the conceptual match to 'Concierge Services' but note the cost discrepancy; rating 8 from ground truth. The premium_membership directly maps to 'Premium Insurance Membership' — rating 10.
